schema.name: BitsightIndustrialStatistics_CL
schema.description: The BitsightIndustrialStatistics table contains industry peer comparison statistics per risk vector for each portfolio company from the BitSight API ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: RiskVector
columns.description: Risk vector slug (dict key — always null due to CCF JSONPath limitation).

columns.name: IncidentCount
columns.description: Number of incidents for this risk vector in the industry over the measured period.

columns.name: AverageDurationDays
columns.description: Average duration in days for incidents of this risk vector in the industry.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name identifier for multi-instance tracking.
